# uptimekuma_notification_max (Resource)

MAX messenger notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_max" "example" {
  name      = "MAX Notifications"
  bot_token = "your-bot-token"
  chat_id   = "-123456789"
  is_active = true

  # Optional: Use a custom message template
  use_template    = true
  template        = "Monitor: {{ name }}\nStatus: {{ status }}"
  template_format = "markdown"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bot_token` (String, Sensitive) MAX messenger bot token
- `chat_id` (String) MAX messenger chat ID to send notifications to
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) MAX messenger API base URL
- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `template` (String) Custom message template for notifications
- `template_format` (String) Format of the custom message template (e.g. `markdown`)
- `use_template` (Boolean) Enable custom message template

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
